panels.title: 🕳 Tick Gap Detector — Symbols không có trade > 60s (trong giờ giao dịch)
panels.description: Symbols đang active nhưng không nhận được tick trong 60s trong giờ giao dịch HOSE (09:00–15:00). Có thể do producer không subscribe đúng symbol.

targets.rawSql: WITH active_symbols AS (SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM instrument_master WHERE is_active = true), last_tick AS (SELECT symbol, MAX(exchange_ts) AS last_trade FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY symbol) SELECT a.symbol AS "Symbol", COALESCE(to_char(l.last_trade AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', 'HH24:MI:SS'), 'Chưa có tick hôm nay') AS "Tick Cuối (ICT)", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - l.last_trade))::numeric, 0) AS "Giây Không Có Tick" FROM active_symbols a LEFT JOIN last_tick l ON a.symbol = l.symbol WHERE (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '09:00' AND '15:00' AND (l.last_trade IS NULL OR NOW() - l.last_trade > INTERVAL '60 seconds') ORDER BY "Giây Không Có Tick" DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 30

panels.title: 🚨 Price Anomaly — Giá vượt Trần/Sàn từ Security Definition
panels.description: Giao dịch có giá nằm ngoài giới hạn trần/sàn theo Security Definition. Phát hiện lỗi parse dữ liệu hoặc dữ liệu sai từ nguồn.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.symbol AS "Symbol", t.price AS "Giá GD", sd.ceiling_price AS "Trần", sd.floor_price AS "Sàn", CASE WHEN t.price > sd.ceiling_price THEN '🔴 Vượt Trần' WHEN t.price < sd.floor_price THEN '🔵 Dưới Sàn' END AS "Loại", to_char(t.exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Thời gian" FROM market_trade t JOIN security_definition sd ON t.symbol = sd.symbol AND t.market_id = sd.market_id AND sd.trading_date = (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') WHERE t.exchange_ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND sd.ceiling_price IS NOT NULL AND (t.price > sd.ceiling_price OR t.price < sd.floor_price) ORDER BY t.exchange_ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 📉 Null/Zero Bid-Ask Rate — order_book_l2
panels.description: % record có bid_price1 hoặc ask_price1 bị null/zero. Tăng đột biến = lỗi parse hoặc sàn gửi dữ liệu thiếu.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', exchange_ts) AS time, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bid_price1 IS NULL OR bid_price1 = 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "Null Bid %", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ask_price1 IS NULL OR ask_price1 = 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "Null Ask %" FROM order_book_l2 WHERE $__timeFilter(exchange_ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📊 Session OHLCV Completeness — Symbols theo ATO/Liên tục/ATC
panels.description: Số tick mỗi symbol nhận được trong ATO (09:00-09:15), giờ liên tục và ATC (14:30-15:00). Symbols có 0 tick = không subscribe hoặc mã không giao dịch hôm nay.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '09:00' AND '09:15') AS "ATO Ticks", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '09:15' AND '14:30') AS "Liên Tục Ticks", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '14:30' AND '15:00') AS "ATC Ticks", COUNT(*) AS "Tổng Hôm Nay", ROUND(MIN(price)::numeric, 2) AS "Low", ROUND(MAX(price)::numeric, 2) AS "High" FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts >= (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') GROUP BY symbol HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY "Tổng Hôm Nay" ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT 'Symbols có tick' AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol)::double precision AS value FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts >= (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') UNION ALL SELECT 'Tổng trade ticks', COUNT(*)::double precision FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts >= (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') UNION ALL SELECT 'Anomaly giá', COUNT(*)::double precision FROM market_trade t JOIN security_definition sd ON t.symbol = sd.symbol AND t.market_id = sd.market_id AND sd.trading_date = (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') WHERE t.exchange_ts >= (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AND sd.ceiling_price IS NOT NULL AND (t.price > sd.ceiling_price OR t.price < sd.floor_price)
